creator: njh@bandsman.co.uk
text:
I've removed and reinstalled the package, to no avail.

This may help:

$ ldd /usr/local/bin/perl
/usr/local/bin/perl:
	libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x2003c000)
	libperl.so.5.24 => /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24/mach/CORE/libperl.so.5.24 (0x20100000)
	libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x20069000)
	libcrypt.so.5 => /lib/libcrypt.so.5 (0x2008d000)
	libutil.so.9 => /lib/libutil.so.9 (0x200b3000)
	libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x20300000)
	libgcc_s.so.1 => /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 (0x200cc000)
